password.too_short: Password must be at least {min} characters long.
password.too_long: Password must be no more than {max} characters long.
password.missing_lowercase: Password must contain at least 1 lowercase letter.
password.missing_uppercase: Password must contain at least 1 uppercase letter.
password.missing_number: Password must contain at least 1 number.
password.missing_special_char: Password must contain at least 1 special character.

signupErrorCodes.user_already_exists: Enter an email that has not been used to sign up before.

candy.title: Sign Up Success
candy.warning: But, email confirmation is required to use the account.
candy.details: We have sent you an authentication link to the email({email}) you signed up for. Please check your email.
